title: Simplify ByteMeal: Keep 3 core forms, NGO status actions, remove Dashboard/stats

requirements.text: Remove the Dashboard page route and all navigation links pointing to it from the React app (frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The Dashboard page (frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx) should no longer be accessible or linked.

quotes: vah jo dashboard hai aur Lakshya bataye kitne user hai yah sab mere Ko nahin chahie

acceptanceCriteria: No navigation link for Dashboard exists in the navbar.
The /dashboard route is removed from App.tsx.
Navigating to /dashboard shows a 404 or redirects to home.

requirements.text: Remove the Food Listings page route and navigation link from the React app (frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The FoodListings page should no longer be accessible or linked.

quotes: baki sab functionalities mere Ko nahin chahie

acceptanceCriteria: No navigation link for Food Listings exists in the navbar.
The /listings route is removed from App.tsx.

requirements.text: Remove the Admin NGO Approval page route and navigation link ('Admin: NGOs') from the React app (frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The AdminNGOApproval page should no longer be accessible or linked from the main navigation.

quotes: baki sab functionalities mere Ko nahin chahie

acceptanceCriteria: No 'Admin: NGOs' link appears in the navigation bar.
The /admin/ngo-approval route is removed from App.tsx.

requirements.text: Update the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) so it only contains links to: Home, Donate (Donor Form), Get Help (Assistance Request Form), Volunteer, and NGO Register. All other nav links must be removed.

quotes: ek donor wala form register wala FIR ek NGO wala ho ek volunteer wala

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation shows exactly: Home, Donate, Get Help, Volunteer, NGO Register.
No other links (Dashboard, Food Listings, Admin) appear in the nav.

requirements.text: On the Food Listings page (frontend/src/pages/FoodListings.tsx) and in the backend (backend/main.mo), add 'Accept' and 'Mark as Collected' action buttons to each donation card. NGOs should be able to click 'Accept' to mark a donation as 'Accepted' and 'Mark as Collected' to mark it as 'Collected'. The donation status must be persisted in the backend. Display the current status as a badge on each donation card ('Available' in green, 'Accepted' in orange/sky-blue, 'Collected' in gray).

quotes: agar koi NGO food collect karta hai to use per accepted ya collected karke option dikhana chahie

acceptanceCriteria: Each donation card shows an 'Accept' button when status is 'Available'.
Clicking 'Accept' updates the donation status to 'Accepted' in the backend and reflects on the UI.
Each 'Accepted' donation card shows a 'Mark as Collected' button.
Clicking 'Mark as Collected' updates the donation status to 'Collected' in the backend and reflects on the UI.
Status badge on each card updates to reflect current state: Available (green), Accepted (sky-blue), Collected (gray).
Toast notification is shown on successful status update (e.g., 'Donation marked as Accepted').
Backend exposes an updateDonationStatus function that accepts a donation ID and new status string.

requirements.text: Re-expose the Food Listings page as an accessible route (e.g., /listings) and add it back to navigation — but only if REQ-30 conflicts with the NGO 'Accept'/'Collected' feature (REQ-33). If the Food Listings page is needed for NGOs to take action on donations, keep it in the nav under a label like 'Food Listings' or 'Manage Donations'. Otherwise, keep it removed.

quotes: agar koi NGO food collect karta hai to use per accepted ya collected karke option dikhana chahie

acceptanceCriteria: NGOs can access a page listing donations with Accept/Collected action buttons.
The page is reachable via a navigation link.

requirements.text: Update the Home landing page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to remove any references to the Dashboard or Food Listings in its CTA buttons or feature highlights. Keep only the 'Donate Food' and 'Get Help' CTA buttons. Remove any platform stats counters (total donations, volunteers, requests) from the Home page.

quotes: Lakshya bataye kitne user hai yah sab mere Ko nahin chahie

acceptanceCriteria: Home page shows only 'Donate Food' and 'Get Help' as primary CTA buttons.
No live stats counters (donation count, volunteer count, request count) are displayed on the Home page.
No links or buttons pointing to Dashboard or Food Listings appear on Home.

constraints: Do not remove or modify the Donor Form, NGO Registration Form, Volunteer Form, or Assistance Request Form pages or their backend logic.
All existing form submission toast notifications (success/failure) must remain intact.
Preserve the Glassmorphism design system (orange #FF6B2B, sky blue #38BDF8, frosted glass cards, food background).
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Rebuilding or redesigning the Donor, NGO, or Volunteer forms.
Adding any new authentication or user account features.
Modifying the standalone HTML/CSS/JS version in frontend/standalone/.
Adding new pages beyond what is specified.
Changing the overall Glassmorphism visual design.
